case_title: 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. MALCOLM GILBERT ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GILBERT, MALCOLM

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILBERT, MALCOLM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NOT AT ISSUE $3,900.00 RENT, $440.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $480.00 COSTS, $5,128.40 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $425.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,523.40, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GILBERT, MALCOLM
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GILBERT, MALCOLM
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GILBERT, MALCOLM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 45 LANSING STREET #1613, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
